form.formComment: Comes here off a 43-day let-up. At the latest run 10th of 12 at this track on February 23 over 1500m, 10 len behind Danon Figo carrying 57kg at $46.80. The start before that came from midfield and won by 1.5 len at this track January 29 over 1500m defeating Melt with 57kg at $3.90. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Freshened for 62 days. Resuming made some head-way from midfield; 4th of 15 at Ohi on January 28 over 2600m, 6 len behind Gluhwurm carrying 56kg at $73.50. Last start 6th of 12 at Kawasaki on February 4 over 2100m, 6 len behind Suleyman with 57kg at $15.10. Can't recommend against this lot.
